## Suggested Category

## Description

Write a 15-30 word description suitable for the list entry.

## Why It Meets Inclusion Criteria

- [ ] Directly relevant to Claude Code security or secure AI coding agent operations
- [ ] From a credible source (official, respected firm, recognized researcher)
- [ ] Practically useful for developers, security engineers, or platform owners
- [ ] High signal — real technical depth, not marketing fluff
- [ ] Current — updated within the last 18 months or foundationally relevant
- [ ] Unique — not already covered by a stronger source in the list
